__PIXEL_SIGIL_ISA_REIFICATION_ULTIMA__.HGPU_Shader_EML: uniform sampler2D u_sigil; out vec4 color; void main() { vec4 data = texture(u_sigil, gl_FragCoord.xy); float res = exp(data.r) - log(data.g); color = vec4(res, data.b, data.a, 1.0); }
__PIXEL_SIGIL_ISA_REIFICATION_ULTIMA__.Compiler_JS: async function compileSigil(artifact) { const str = JSON.stringify(artifact); const b = new TextEncoder().encode(str); const size = Math.ceil(Math.sqrt(b.length / 4)); const canvas = document.createElement("canvas"); canvas.width = canvas.height = size; const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d"); const d = ctx.createImageData(size, size); d.data.set(b); ctx.putImageData(d, 0, 0); return canvas.toDataURL("image/png"); }
